summary: Backend-only testing for Beauty Salon Accounting API. Created pytest suite covering auth, all CRUD resources (products, services, customers, appointments, expenses), invoice creation with stock decrement + customer stats update, dashboard report shape, auth enforcement (401 unauthenticated), and admin-only delete role enforcement (403 for cashier). All 12 tests passed.

minor.issue: Allows any authenticated user to delete; spec said admin-only deletes for products/services/customers/invoices/expenses (appointments not in that list, so this is per spec). No issue.
No validation that product stock is sufficient before decrementing - stock can go negative. Cosmetic, not breaking.
Returns 404 only after update_one runs (which does nothing for non-existent id). Acceptable but means PUT on missing id silently no-ops then 404s.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 589 lines - acceptable but approaching split threshold; consider modularizing routers per resource if growing further.
JWT_SECRET has a hardcoded default ('beauty-salon-secret-key-2026') - in production this should be required via env without default.
Invoice creation does not guard against negative stock; consider rejecting if requested quantity > stock.
Deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - migrate to lifespan handler.
create_invoice serializes items twice (once via inv.model_dump(), then overwrites). Minor redundancy.
No pagination on list endpoints (.to_list(1000-5000)) - fine for current scope but flag for scaling.
test_credentials: admin@salon.com / admin123 (seeded). Test cashier created during role test: TEST_cashier1@salon.com / pass1234
seed_data_creation: All test data uses TEST_ prefix and is cleaned up within tests. A cashier user TEST_cashier1@salon.com persists in DB after the role test (register endpoint has no delete-self).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all required flows. All 12 tests green against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Stock decrement on product invoice items and customer total_spent/visits increment on invoice with customer_id are verified. Dashboard returns sales_by_day length 14 confirmed. Admin-only delete enforced (403 for cashier) verified. Frontend skipped per request.
